passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text: Admits up to 4 persons free of charge
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 persons free of charge

passes.title: The Danforth
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits up to 6 guests to Davis Farmland or Davis Mega Maze with $10 off the at-the-gate admission rate.
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 6 guests to Davis Farmland or Davis Mega Maze with $10 off the at-the-gate admission rate.

passes.title: Davis Farmland
passes.benefit_text: Up to three half price admissions.
source_phrases: Up to three half price admissions.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text: Admits 2 persons; adults at 1/2 price, children (5-17) $1.00
source_phrases: Admits 2 persons; adults at 1/2 price, children (5-17) $1.00

passes.title: Garden In The Woods Native Plant Trust
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits 4 people at $5 a person.
source_phrases: Pass admits 4 people at $5 a person.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: Pass allows free daytime parking for one carload to most Massachusetts State Parks, State Forests, or State Reservations that charge a parking fee.
source_phrases: Pass allows free daytime parking for one carload to most Massachusetts State Parks, State Forests, or State Reservations that charge a parking fee.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text: Admits up to two adults at $15 per person and four youths (7-17) at $10 per person. Visitors under 7 are always admitted for free.
source_phrases: Admits up to two adults at $15 per person and four youths (7-17) at $10 per person. Visitors under 7 are always admitted for free.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text: Admits 4 persons at 50% off regular admission
source_phrases: Admits 4 persons at 50% off regular admission

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text: Admits up to 4 persons at 50% off regular price
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 persons at 50% off regular price

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text: Admits 2 persons at 50% off regular price
source_phrases: Admits 2 persons at 50% off regular price

passes.title: New England Botanic Garden At Tower Hill
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits up to 2 people at $12 per person
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 2 people at $12 per person

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits up to 5 persons free of charge
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 5 persons free of charge

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits up to 2 persons at 50% off regular price
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 2 persons at 50% off regular price

passes.title: Worcester Art Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 6 persons, $9 per adult and $6 per child. Under age 2 is free.
*For daytime general admission to Franklin Park Zoo or Stone Zoo only. Not valid for Boston Lights or ZooLights
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 6 persons, $9 per adult and $6 per child. Under age 2 is free.
